title: Pear
description:
silly modpack for my friends

hopefully runs ok

its pear there is nothing else needed to say

Actually there is something needed to say, you NEED sinytra connector to work, I did not add it to the pack because I wasn't sure if it would let me
body:
This roughly-put-together modpack adds a bunch of fantasy mods in combination with Create and Tinker's Construct, it should run well, I could run it on a low-ish end pc on my own without any major issues.

You should download this if you are a pear or you like pears or Kasane Teto, don't mind that there is barely anything referencing either of them.

[Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) is required for Better Nether and Better End and a few small mods, it WILL NOT RUN without it
Also recommend JEI for all the crafting and Jade to know what you are actually looking at.
